---
title: "Hypothesized Prototypes"
author: "Jeffrey Girard"
date: "2026-05-29"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    fig-width: 10
    fig-format: png
    fig-dpi: 300
embed-resources: true
---

## Setup

```{r setup}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(furrr)
library(gt)
library(facs) # remotes::install_github("jmgirard/facs")
library(ordbetareg)
library(easystats)

info <- 
  left_join(
    read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/session_info.rds"), 
    read_rds("facs_times.rds"), 
    by = c("subject", "wave")
  ) |> 
  filter(
    !(subject == 18 & wave == 6),
    wave %in% c(6, 9)
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    valid_session = session_duration - vis - hat,
    valid_fullface = ffa - vis - hat
  )

facs <- 
  read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/facs_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info) |> 
  mutate(event_id = str_c(subject, wave, facs_id, sep = "_"))

project_scheme <- scheme(
  list(
    occurrence = c(1:2, 4:39),
    intensity = c(1:2, 4:39),
    asymmetry = c(1:2, 4:39)
  )
)

protos <- 
  prototypes |> 
  filter(is.na(emotion_type) | emotion_type != "compound") |> 
  mutate(
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("anger", "angry"), "anger", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("confused", "confusion"), "confusion", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("desire", "desire food", "desire sex"), "desire", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("disgust", "disgusted"), "disgust", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("fear", "fearful"), "fear", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("happy", "happiness", "joy"), "happiness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("sad", "sadness"), "sadness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("surprise", "surprised"), "surprise", emotion)
  )
```

```{r}
find_missing_aus <- function(proto, scheme, stringify = TRUE) {
  proto_codes <- pull_numcodes(proto)
  scheme_codes <- scheme$occurrence
  missing_aus <- setdiff(proto_codes, scheme_codes)
  if (stringify) {
    paste(missing_aus, collapse = ", ")
  } else {
    missing_aus
  }
}

find_remaining_aus <- function(proto_code, missing_aus) {
  proto_aus <- tidy(proto_code)[[1]]$occurrence
  missing_aus <- str_split(missing_aus, ", ")[[1]]
  remaining_aus <- setdiff(proto_aus, missing_aus)
  if (length(remaining_aus) > 0) {
    coding(paste(remaining_aus, collapse = "+"))
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }
}

protos2 <-
  protos |> 
  arrange(emotion, source, config_num) |> 
  mutate(
    missing_aus = map_chr(code, \(x) find_missing_aus(x, project_scheme)),
    remaining_aus = map2_chr(code, missing_aus, \(x, y) find_remaining_aus(x, y))
  ) |> 
  filter(!is.na(remaining_aus))
write_csv(protos2, "proto_summary.csv", na = "")
```

## Find Duplicated Prototypes

```{r}
protos2 |> 
  summarize(
    .by = remaining_aus,
    n_emotions = n_distinct(emotion),
    emotions = str_c(unique(emotion), collapse = ", ")
  ) |> 
  arrange(desc(n_emotions), remaining_aus) |> 
  filter(n_emotions > 1) |> 
  gt()
```

## Count Prototypes

```{r}
plan("multisession", workers = 9)
occ_counts <- 
  facs |> 
  select(-month) |> 
  mutate(
    occ = future_map_chr(facs_code, function(x) {
      codes <- tidy(coding(x))[[1]]$occurrence
      paste(codes[codes %in% project_scheme$occurrence], collapse = "+")
    }),
    occ = na_if(occ, ""),
    occ = na_if(occ, "NA"),
    occ = coding(occ)
  )
occ_counts_nested <- 
  occ_counts |> 
  nest(.by = c(occ, wave), events = c(subject, event_id, facs_duration, session_duration))
```

```{r}
merged <-
  crossing(
    occ = coding(sort(unique(c(occ_counts_nested$occ, protos2$code)))), 
    wave = c(6, 9)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = occ_counts_nested,
    by = join_by(occ, wave)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = protos2 |> mutate(remaining_aus = coding(remaining_aus)),
    by = join_by(occ == remaining_aus),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  )
```

```{r}
wave_totals <- 
  info |> 
  summarize(
    .by = wave,
    wave_session_total = sum(valid_session, na.rm = TRUE),
    wave_fullface_total = sum(valid_fullface, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

proto_waves <- 
  merged |> 
  drop_na(emotion) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(emotion, wave),
    all_events = list(bind_rows(events)),
    n_protos_total = n(),
    n_protos_occur = sum(map_lgl(events, \(x) !is.null(x))),
    n_subjects = map_int(
      all_events, 
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, length(unique(x$subject)), 0)
    ),
    n_events = map_int(
      all_events,
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, length(unique(x$event_id)), 0)
    ),
    total_sec = map_dbl(
      all_events,
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, sum(distinct(x)$facs_duration), 0)
    )
  ) |> 
  left_join(wave_totals, by = "wave") |> 
  mutate(
    session_pct = total_sec / wave_session_total,
    fullface_pct = total_sec / wave_fullface_total
  ) |> 
  arrange(emotion, wave)

proto_waves |> 
  select(-c(all_events, wave_session_total, wave_fullface_total)) |> 
  mutate(emotion = str_to_title(emotion)) |> 
  gt() |> 
  fmt_percent(columns = c(session_pct, fullface_pct), decimals = 2)
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months")
    ),
    Emotion = str_to_title(emotion)
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Window, y = fullface_pct, color = Emotion, shape = Emotion, group = Emotion)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_manual(values = scales::hue_pal()(21)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(c(21, 22, 24), length.out = 21)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2), shape = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percentage of Valid Full Face Video Frames", 
       color = "Emotion Category", shape = "Emotion Category") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("pct_window_emotion.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
pct_ratio <- sum(info$valid_fullface) / sum(info$valid_session)

proto_waves |> 
  summarize(
    .by = emotion, 
    total_sec = sum(total_sec)
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    session_pct = total_sec / sum(info$valid_session),
    fullface_pct = total_sec / sum(info$valid_fullface),
    Emotion = fct_reorder(factor(str_to_title(emotion)), .x = fullface_pct)
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fullface_pct, y = Emotion)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = 0, yend = Emotion), color = "cornflowerblue") +
  geom_point(color = "cornflowerblue") +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    sec.axis = sec_axis(
      transform = ~ . * pct_ratio,
      name = "Percentage of Valid Session Frames",
      labels = scales::percent,
      breaks = \(x) scales::breaks_extended()(x / pct_ratio) * pct_ratio
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage of Valid Full Face Frames", 
    y = "Emotion Category"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())
ggsave("fig3.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  summarize(
    .by = emotion, 
    total_sec = sum(total_sec)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    session_pct = total_sec / sum(info$valid_session),
    fullface_pct = total_sec / sum(info$valid_fullface)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(fullface_pct)) |> 
  mutate(emotion = str_to_title(emotion)) |> 
  gt() |> 
  grand_summary_rows(
    columns = c(total_sec, session_pct, fullface_pct),
    fns = list(Total = ~sum(., na.rm = TRUE)),
    fmt = list(
      ~ fmt_percent(., columns = c(session_pct, fullface_pct), decimals = 2),
      ~ fmt_number(., columns = total_sec, decimals = 1)
    )
  ) |> 
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(session_pct, fullface_pct), 
    decimals = 2
  ) |> 
  fmt_number(
    columns = total_sec,
    decimals = 1
  )
```

## Model Prototypes

```{r}
occ_counts_long <- 
  occ_counts |> 
  # Sort chronologically within each grouping
  arrange(subject, wave, occ, facs_onset) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = c(subject, wave, occ),
    # Find the maximum offset time seen prior to the current row
    max_offset_so_far = cummax(lag(facs_offset, default = -Inf)),
    # Start a new block if current onset happens after the latest offset
    is_new_block = facs_onset > max_offset_so_far,
    # Assign a unique ID to each continuous block of time
    block_id = cumsum(is_new_block)
  ) |> 
  # Collapse each block into a single, merged start and end time
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, occ, block_id),
    merged_onset = min(facs_onset),
    merged_offset = max(facs_offset)
  ) |> 
  # Calculate the duration of the distinct blocks
  mutate(block_duration = merged_offset - merged_onset) |> 
  # Sum the blocks to get the final, accurate duration
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, occ),
    occ_duration = sum(block_duration)
  )
```


```{r}
protos_distinct <- 
  protos2 |> 
  drop_na(emotion) |> 
  distinct(emotion, remaining_aus) |> 
  mutate(remaining_aus = coding(remaining_aus))

emotion_events <- 
  occ_counts |> 
  inner_join(
    y = protos_distinct,
    by = join_by(occ == remaining_aus),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |> 
  arrange(subject, wave, emotion, facs_onset) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = c(subject, wave, emotion),
    max_offset_so_far = cummax(lag(facs_offset, default = -Inf)),
    is_new_block = facs_onset > max_offset_so_far,
    block_id = cumsum(is_new_block)
  ) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, emotion, block_id),
    merged_onset = min(facs_onset),
    merged_offset = max(facs_offset)
  ) |> 
  mutate(block_duration = merged_offset - merged_onset) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, emotion),
    occ_duration = sum(block_duration)
  )
```

```{r}
emotion_long <- 
  crossing(
    subject = unique(info$subject),
    wave = c(6, 9),
    emotion = unique(protos_distinct$emotion)
  ) |> 
  left_join(emotion_events, by = join_by(subject, wave, emotion)) |> 
  replace_na(list(occ_duration = 0)) |> 
  left_join(
    y = info |> select(subject, wave, valid_session, valid_fullface),
    by = join_by(subject, wave)
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    session_pct = occ_duration / valid_session,
    fullface_pct = occ_duration / valid_fullface
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = emotion,
    m_pct = sum(occ_duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(valid_fullface, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  filter(m_pct >= 0.01)
```

```{r}
describe_distribution(emotion_long, select = c("session_pct", "fullface_pct")) |> print_md()
ggplot(emotion_long, aes(x = fullface_pct)) +
  facet_wrap(~emotion, scales = "free") +
  geom_histogram(na.rm = TRUE, color = "white", bins = 30) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Percent of Valid Full Face Video Frames with Prototype", y = "Video Count") +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
emotion_wide <- 
  emotion_long |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = emotion,
    values_from = fullface_pct,
    id_cols = c(subject, wave)
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    .after = wave, 
    window = factor(wave),
    window_linear = as.integer(factor(wave)) - 1
  )
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

dvs <- c("contentment", "fear", "happiness", "interest", "sadness", "surprise")

models <- 
  map(
    dvs,
    \(x) {
      ordbetareg(
        formula = as.formula(
          paste0(x, " ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject)")
        ),
        data = emotion_wide,
        coef_prior_mean = 0,
        coef_prior_SD = 1.5,
        chains = 4,
        cores = 4,
        refresh = 0,
        backend = "cmdstanr",
        file = paste0("fit_", x),
        control = list(adapt_delta = 0.9)
      )
    }
  ) |> 
  set_names(str_to_title(dvs))
```

```{r}
res <- 
  map(
    models,
    \(x) { 
      describe_posterior(x, parameters = "window") |> 
      as_tibble() |> 
      transmute(
        Est. = Median,
        CL = CI_low,
        CU = CI_high,
        OR = exp(Est.),
        OR_CL = exp(CL),
        OR_CU = exp(CU),
        pval = 2*(1 - pd)
      )
    }
  ) |> 
  set_names(str_to_title(dvs)) |> 
  list_rbind(names_to = "Outcome")

gt(res) |> 
  fmt_number(
    columns = Est.:OR_CU, 
    decimals = 2
  ) |> 
  fmt(
    columns = pval,
    fns = \(x) {
      char_x <- sprintf("%.3f", x)
      char_x <- sub("^0\\.", ".", char_x)
      ifelse(x < 0.001, "<.001", char_x)
    }
  ) |> 
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(Est., CL, CU),
    pattern = "{1} ({2}, {3})"
  ) |> 
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(OR, OR_CL, OR_CU),
    pattern = "{1} ({2}, {3})"
  ) |> 
  cols_label(
    Est. = "Logit Scale",
    OR = "Odds Ratio",
    pval = "p-value"
  ) |> 
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(Est., OR)
  )
```

```{=html}
<p><details><summary>Posterior predictive checks</summary>
```

```{r}
walk(
  dvs,
  \(x) {
    lbl <- str_to_title(x)
    print(
      pp_check(
        models[[lbl]], 
        ndraws = 50, 
        resp = x
      ) + 
      labs(title = lbl)
    )
  }
)
```

```{=html}
</p></details>
```
